moments.title: Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The XXIII Commonwealth Games, also known as Glasgow 2026, are set to begin with an indoor opening ceremony on July 23, running until August 2, featuring 74 nations and a 10-sport programme.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow's buzzing! The Commonwealth Games officially open tomorrow with KT Tunstall headlining the indoor ceremony. Who are you rooting for? #Glasgow2026

angles.name: UK-wide Games Fever
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are here! 74 nations, 10 days of incredible sport starting tomorrow in Glasgow. Get ready for some unforgettable moments.

angles.name: Sporting Action Begins
angles.copy: From athletics to swimming, the Commonwealth Games 2026 are about to ignite. Tune in from July 23rd to August 2nd to catch all the action!

moments.title: Latitude Festival kicks off in Suffolk
moments.blurb: The Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, celebrating 20 years with a lineup across music, comedy, arts, and more.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Buzz
angles.copy: It's here! Latitude Festival opens its gates tomorrow in Henham Park for four days of amazing music and arts. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Latitude Festival 2026 starts tomorrow! Get ready for a huge weekend of live music, comedy, and discovery. Who's heading to Henham Park?

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, singer, and drummer of the Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday today, July 22, 2026. He is known for hits like 'Hotel California' and 'Desperado'.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles legend Don Henley! What's your favourite Eagles track featuring his iconic vocals?

angles.name: Classic Rock Birthday
angles.copy: From the Eagles to his solo career, Don Henley has given us so many timeless songs. Happy 79th birthday to a true rock icon!

moments.title: Slash celebrates 61st birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) turns 61 on July 23, 2026, known for his distinctive top hat and iconic guitar riffs.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff or solo? 🎸

angles.name: Iconic Axeman
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary top-hatted guitarist Slash turns 61! Celebrate with us by cranking up your favourite GNR tracks.

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24, 2026, marking decades of influence in music, film, and fashion.

angles.name: JLo's Big Day
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on Friday. What's your ultimate J.Lo anthem?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From the dance floor to the silver screen, Jennifer Lopez has done it all. Happy 57th birthday to a true icon this Friday!

moments.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26, 2026.

angles.name: Rolling Stone's Icon
angles.copy: Still strutting and rocking! Mick Jagger hits 83 this Sunday. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: An incredible 83 years young for Sir Mick Jagger this weekend! The Rolling Stones frontman continues to inspire.

moments.title: Kate Bush celebrates 68th birthday
moments.blurb: The enigmatic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush will turn 68 on July 30, 2026, known for her unique musical style and artistry.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Icon
angles.copy: The truly incomparable Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday next Thursday! What's your favourite magical moment from her discography?

angles.name: Art-Pop Pioneer
angles.copy: Ahead of her 68th birthday next week, we're celebrating the enduring artistry of Kate Bush. A true visionary!

moments.title: Premier League Summer Transfer Window Activity
moments.blurb: The Premier League summer transfer window is in full swing, with clubs making significant signings and sales ahead of the new season, closing on September 1.

angles.name: Transfer Window Frenzy
angles.copy: The Premier League transfer window is buzzing! Who's made the best signings so far, and who needs to get busy?

angles.name: Club Signings
angles.copy: Plenty of confirmed ins and outs across the Premier League today! Keep up with all the latest deals as clubs build for the 2026/27 season.

moments.title: Exeter Chiefs under new American ownership
moments.blurb: Exeter Chiefs Rugby Group Ltd is now under new American ownership by Cannae Holdings Inc., with CEO Ryan Caswell pledging to build on the club's history and invest in the academy.

angles.name: Chiefs New Era
angles.copy: Big news for Exeter Chiefs! New American owners Cannae Holdings Inc. are promising to take the club to the next level. What are your hopes for the new era?

angles.name: Rugby Investment
angles.copy: Exciting times for Westcountry rugby as Exeter Chiefs embark on a new chapter under American ownership, with pledges for academy investment.

moments.title: Cardiff Castle hosts major gigs
moments.blurb: Cardiff Castle is hosting a series of major outdoor concerts this week and next, including Self Esteem (July 24), The Wombats (July 25), David Byrne (July 26), and The Streets (July 31).

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Live
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is the place to be for live music this week! Self Esteem, The Wombats, and David Byrne are all playing. Who are you seeing?

angles.name: Welsh Gig Guide
angles.copy: Don't miss the incredible lineup at Cardiff Castle over the next few days! From Self Esteem to The Streets, there's something for everyone.

moments.title: Exeter Cavern hosts live music
moments.blurb: Exeter Cavern has a busy week ahead with 'Black Parade - 00s Emo Anthems' on Friday, July 24, and other local acts.

angles.name: Exeter Night Out
angles.copy: Looking for live music in Exeter this weekend? The Cavern has 'Black Parade - 00s Emo Anthems' on Friday! Who's going?

angles.name: Emo Anthems
angles.copy: Calling all 00s emo fans in Exeter! Get ready for a night of anthems at The Cavern this Friday with 'Black Parade'.

moments.title: UK Schools on Summer Holidays
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are now in full swing across England, Wales, and Scotland, with most schools having broken up this week or last.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here for most schools across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Holiday Mode Activated
angles.copy: No more school runs for a while! Summer holidays are on. Time for staycations, day trips, and making memories.

moments.title: Together Again Festival in Cheshire
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival takes place from July 24-26, 2026, at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire, promising a celebration of music, arts, and culture with a family-friendly atmosphere.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival Fun
angles.copy: Heading to Together Again Festival this weekend? Bolesworth Castle is set for three days of fantastic music and good vibes!

angles.name: Family Festival Weekend
angles.copy: Together Again Festival kicks off Friday in Cheshire! World-class music and a family-friendly atmosphere await. Who's got their tickets?

moments.title: Big Love Festival celebrates 10th year in South Wales
moments.blurb: Big Love, a small 4-day music festival in South Wales, is celebrating its 10th anniversary this July, featuring over 140 bands and DJs.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Anniversary
angles.copy: Happy 10th Birthday to Big Love Festival in South Wales! Are you heading to the UK's friendliest small festival this year?

angles.name: South Wales Music
angles.copy: Celebrating a decade of music and good times! Big Love Festival in South Wales is marking its 10th anniversary this month.

moments.title: New Music Friday: Charli XCX, Shania Twain
moments.blurb: This Friday, July 24, new albums are expected from Charli XCX ('Music, Fashion, Film') and Shania Twain ('Little Miss Twain').

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: New Music Friday is coming! This week, look out for new albums from Charli XCX and Shania Twain. What are you adding to your playlist?

angles.name: Shania Twain Album
angles.copy: Get ready for some new Shania! Her album 'Little Miss Twain' is due this New Music Friday. Still the one!
